reviews.body:
**Actionable comments posted: 1**

<details>
<summary>🤖 Prompt for all review comments with AI agents</summary>

```
Verify each finding against current code. Fix only still-valid issues, skip the
rest with a brief reason, keep changes minimal, and validate.

Inline comments:
In `@src/math.js`:
- Around line 1-3: The unsafeDivide function lacks input validation and a
zero-division guard; update unsafeDivide to first verify both a and b are finite
numbers (use Number.isFinite) and throw a TypeError if not, then check if b ===
0 and throw a RangeError (or a clear error message) to prevent returning
Infinity/NaN; keep the actual division only after these checks so downstream
code receives deterministic errors instead of corrupted numeric results.
```

</details>
